summary: Notification Reminder Settings feature tested successfully. Backend API (15/15 tests passed) and Frontend UI (all features verified). Profile page displays 4 tabs, Notifications tab shows ReminderSettings component with In-App toggles, Email toggles, and all 7 Reminder Timing buttons. Save/Update functionality working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ReminderSettings component properly implemented with all data-testid attributes
Toggle switches using proper checkbox implementation with sr-only class for accessibility
Save button shows dynamic state (Saved/Save Changes/Saving...)
Unsaved changes warning displayed when user modifies settings
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test advocate account
context_for_next_testing_agent: ReminderSettings component fully tested. Profile page has 4 tabs (Basic Info, Public Profile, Notifications, Security). Notifications tab contains: 1) ReminderSettings component with In-App Notifications (4 toggles), Email Notifications (4 toggles), and Reminder Timing (7 buttons from 5min to 2days), 2) Push Notification Preferences section below. Backend endpoints: GET /api/notifications/reminder-preferences, PUT /api/notifications/reminder-preferences (requires CSRF token from login response body). Security tab shows placeholder content with Password, 2FA, Active Sessions, and Delete Account options.

features_verified.profile_page_4_tabs: PASS - Basic Info, Public Profile, Notifications, Security tabs all visible
features_verified.notifications_tab_click: PASS - Tab clickable and activates correctly
features_verified.in_app_notifications_section: PASS - Section with 4 toggle options (Event Reminders, Calendar Updates, Task Alerts, System Notifications)
features_verified.email_notifications_section: PASS - Section with 4 toggle options (Event Reminders, Calendar Updates, Task Due Dates, System Emails)
features_verified.unsaved_changes_warning: PASS - Warning displayed after making changes
features_verified.save_preferences: PASS - Clicking save sends PUT request, success toast shown
features_verified.security_tab: PASS - Shows placeholder content with Password, 2FA, Sessions, Delete Account
features_verified.GET_reminder_preferences: PASS - Returns all preference fields correctly
features_verified.PUT_reminder_preferences: PASS - Updates preferences with proper CSRF authentication
